expectations.name: daily_row_count_gt_1m
expectations.description: Every event_date partition contains more than 1M incident rows.
expectations.sql: select count(*) as failed_count from (select event_date, count(*) as row_count from incident_warehouse.analytics.fct_incidents group by event_date having count(*) <= 1000000)

expectations.name: incident_id_no_duplicates_no_nulls
expectations.description: incident_id is present and unique across fct_incidents.
expectations.sql: select count(*) as failed_count from (select incident_id from incident_warehouse.analytics.fct_incidents where incident_id is null union all select incident_id from incident_warehouse.analytics.fct_incidents group by incident_id having count(*) > 1)

expectations.name: timestamp_last_48_hours_only
expectations.description: event_date is constrained to the last 48 hours in UTC.
expectations.sql: select count(*) as failed_count from incident_warehouse.analytics.fct_incidents where event_date < dateadd(hour, -48, current_timestamp())::date or event_date > current_date()

expectations.name: severity_allowed_values
expectations.description: severity contains only INFO, WARNING, or CRITICAL.
expectations.sql: select count(*) as failed_count from incident_warehouse.analytics.fct_incidents where severity is null or severity not in ('INFO', 'WARNING', 'CRITICAL')

expectations.name: region_allowed_values
expectations.description: region_key resolves to Bangalore, Singapore, or Tokyo.
expectations.sql: select count(*) as failed_count from incident_warehouse.analytics.fct_incidents f left join incident_warehouse.analytics.dim_regions r on f.region_key = r.region_id where r.region_name is null or r.region_name not in ('Bangalore', 'Singapore', 'Tokyo')

expectations.name: cpu_values_between_0_and_100
expectations.description: cpu_percent is null or between 0 and 100 inclusive.
expectations.sql: select count(*) as failed_count from incident_warehouse.analytics.fct_incidents where cpu_percent is not null and (cpu_percent < 0 or cpu_percent > 100)

expectations.name: api_latency_99th_percentile_0_to_5000ms
expectations.description: The 99th percentile of api_latency_ms is between 0 and 5000 milliseconds.
expectations.sql: select case when coalesce(percentile_cont(0.99) within group (order by api_latency_ms), 0) between 0 and 5000 then 0 else 1 end as failed_count from incident_warehouse.analytics.fct_incidents where api_latency_ms is not null

expectations.name: no_rows_with_all_metrics_null
expectations.description: No incident row has all numeric metrics and metric counts null.
expectations.sql: select count(*) as failed_count from incident_warehouse.analytics.fct_incidents where cpu_percent is null and memory_percent is null and api_latency_ms is null and cpu_spike_count is null and memory_spike_count is null and api_latency_count is null and auth_failure_count is null
